name: 【出品】05_25-中国-越境EC出品ゲートウェイ_V5

parameters.query: SELECT pm.*, im.quantity, im.purchase_price FROM products_master pm LEFT JOIN inventory_master im ON pm.id = im.product_id WHERE pm.id = $1
SELECT * FROM china_marketplaces WHERE platform_code = $1 AND is_active = true
SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM global_settings WHERE setting_key LIKE 'exchange_rate_%' OR setting_key LIKE 'china_%' OR setting_key LIKE '%_fee_%'

INSERT INTO china_listings (product_id, marketplace_id, title_cn, price_cny, original_price_cny, shipping_model, listing_status) SELECT $1, cm.id, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'draft' FROM china_marketplaces cm WHERE cm.platform_code = $6 RETURNING id

nodes.name: 🔐 HMAC署名検証
nodes.notes: [EMPIRE_OS_V6] セキュリティ強制挿入
